memory.summary: I have a free afternoon with low stress, making it an ideal time to tackle the quick chore before starting my term project.
Completed a trivial chore in 30 minutes, gaining minimal progress. I feel refreshed and ready to start the term project.
The trivial chore took longer than expected, yielding only 0.05 progress despite feeling refreshed. I should reassess the term project start time given the delay.

The trivial chore yielded only 0.17 progress in an hour, confirming my earlier concern about the delay. With the afternoon slipping and low energy, I must immediately reassess starting the term project.
Spending another hour on the trivial chore yielded only 0.17 progress, confirming previous delays and increasing my sleep debt.
The trivial chore finally yielded 0.24 progress, but my sleep debt and stress remain high despite the instant win.
Despite the 0.27 progress gain, the trivial chore continues to yield diminishing returns while my sleep debt and stress levels remain critically high.
Spending 1.5 hours on the trivial chore only increased progress by 0.08, confirming diminishing returns and further increasing my sleep debt despite the instant win.
The 0.5h trivial win added only 0.02 progress, confirming diminishing returns while my sleep debt and stress remain critically high.
Another 0.5h on the trivial chore yielded minimal progress while my sleep debt and stress remain critically high.
The trivial chore's diminishing returns persist, and my sleep debt remains critically high despite the small progress gain.
The 0.5h trivial win confirmed diminishing returns again, with minimal progress added while my critical sleep debt and stress levels remain unchanged.
